title: Getting Started with Java
description: Set up your environment and write your very first Java program.

title: Variables & Data Types
description: Understand how Java stores and manages data in memory.

title: Operators & Expressions
description: Perform calculations, comparisons, and logical operations.

title: Control Flow
description: Control the logic and flow of your Java programs.

title: Methods & Functions
description: Write reusable blocks of code with methods.

title: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
description: Master the four pillars of OOP: encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction.

title: Sentence Structure
description: Learn how to build clear and correct English sentences.

title: Paragraph Writing
description: Structure your ideas into coherent paragraphs.

title: Essay Writing
description: Compose well-structured academic and personal essays.

title: Common Grammar Mistakes
description: Identify and fix the most frequent grammar errors.

title: Intro to JavaScript
description: What JavaScript is, where it runs, and how to write your first script in the browser.

title: Variables, Types & Operators
description: let, const, var — data types, type coercion, and operators.

title: Functions & Scope
description: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions, closures, and scope chains.

title: Arrays & Objects
description: Work with collections, destructuring, spread/rest, and object methods.

title: DOM & Browser APIs
description: Select elements, handle events, and manipulate the page dynamically.

title: Async JavaScript
description: Callbacks, Promises, async/await, and the event loop explained clearly.

title: Getting Started with Python
description: Install Python, run your first script, and understand the Python ecosystem.

title: Core Data Types & Variables
description: Integers, floats, strings, booleans, and None — how Python stores data.

title: Control Flow & Loops
description: if/elif/else, for loops, while loops, and list comprehensions.

title: Functions & Modules
description: Define functions, use default args, *args/**kwargs, and import modules.

title: Lists, Dicts & File I/O
description: Work with Python's most-used data structures and read/write files.

title: What is AI & Machine Learning?
description: Understand the difference between AI, ML, and Deep Learning. Where does it actually run?

title: Data & Features
description: How ML models learn from data. Features, labels, datasets, and cleaning.

title: Supervised Learning
description: Linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees — with Python examples.

title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning
description: How neural networks work: layers, weights, activation functions, and training.

title: Working with LLMs & APIs
description: Use OpenAI, Gemini, and open-source LLMs. Prompt engineering and API integration.

title: Writing Code Comments & Docstrings
description: How to write clear, helpful comments that make your code self-documenting.

title: README & Documentation
description: Structure a great README. Write docs that developers actually want to read.

title: Commit Messages & PR Descriptions
description: Write meaningful git commit messages and pull request descriptions.

title: Dev Team Communication
description: Slack messages, code review feedback, stand-up updates — communicate like a senior dev.
